title: Notifications - Update Available
scenario: Background firmware update notification redirects to Device Settings > Software Update tab when tapped on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and pair/connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Ensure the connected Poly device has a firmware version lower than the current version available on the server/cloud.
3. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
4. Wait for the app to check for firmware updates in the background.
5. Observe the device notification area for a firmware update notification from the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the app behavior upon tapping the notification.
expected: A notification appears indicating a firmware update is available. Tapping the notification opens the Poly Studio Mobile app and redirects the user to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
